query.text: Hello doctor,For three months now, two days after finishing a 21-day course of antibiotics to clear an E.Coli UTI, I have redness on my meatus and lighter redness on my glans and also intermittent irritation of the foreskin. All this with no itching, no discharge o.r pain whatsoever. I have been tested for UTI again and also all possible STD's and all are negative. I was sent to a dermatologist and she told me it might be a yeast infection and prescribed a two time 150 mg of Fluconazole which had absolutely no effect. I also prior to all my visits to the doctors tried treating myself topically a week at a time with multiple creams such as Canesten, Fucidin, coconut oil, shea butter which all do nothing but hydrate the skin. I have been taking probiotics and antifungal supplements, following a low sugar diet for almost a month and nothing cuts it.I am starting to wonder if it could be something else than a fungal infection since nothing I have tried is working. Could it be bacterial. Are symptoms different. And if my symptoms are causing no pain could it be something else than an infection.The image for that is attached  below
